detail.description: Jase Bowen singles on a line drive to left fielder Max Kepler. Miguel Andujar scores.
Jase Bowen grounds out, shortstop Ildemaro Vargas to first baseman Pavin Smith.
Jase Bowen flies out to center fielder Tommy Troy.
Jase Bowen bunt grounds out softly, pitcher Jose Cabrera to first baseman Pavin Smith. Jase Bowen out at 1st. Jase Bowen out on batter interference.
Jase Bowen flies out sharply to center fielder Tim Tawa.
Jase Bowen lines out sharply to center fielder Tommy Troy.
Jase Bowen grounds into a force out, shortstop Alex Freeland to second baseman Tommy Edman. Gavin Sheets out at 2nd. Jase Bowen to 1st.
Jase Bowen doubles (1) on a fly ball to right fielder Eli White.
Jase Bowen flies out to right fielder Blake Dunn.
Jase Bowen singles on a fly ball to center fielder Blake Dunn. Xander Bogaerts to 3rd.
Jase Bowen singles on a soft bunt ground ball to first baseman Sal Stewart. Gavin Sheets to 3rd.
Jase Bowen flies out to left fielder JJ Bleday.
Jase Bowen flies out sharply to center fielder A.J. Ewing.
Jase Bowen grounds out, third baseman Brett Baty to first baseman Jared Young.
Jase Bowen flies out to right fielder Carson Benge.
Jase Bowen flies out to right fielder Leody Taveras.
Jase Bowen lines into a double play, pitcher Albert Suárez to first baseman Pete Alonso. Nick Solak out at 1st.
Jase Bowen flies out to center fielder Leody Taveras.
Jase Bowen grounds out, first baseman Pete Alonso to pitcher Trey Gibson.
Jase Bowen lines out to left fielder Brandon Marsh.
Jase Bowen flies out to right fielder Adolis García.
Jase Bowen singles on a line drive to center fielder Justin Crawford. Xander Bogaerts to 3rd.
Jase Bowen grounds out, third baseman Alex Bregman to first baseman Michael Busch.
Jase Bowen grounds into a force out, third baseman Alex Bregman to second baseman Nico Hoerner. Xander Bogaerts out at 2nd.
Jase Bowen grounds out, shortstop Ezequiel Duran to first baseman Jake Burger.
